qemu.description: Whether or not to use QEMU userspace emulation for this architecture.
qemu.title: Use QEMU

runner.description: What GitHub Actions Runner tag to use for this architecture.
runner.title: GitHub Actions Runner

support_type.description: The support tier for this particular platform.
support_type.title: Support Tier

notes.description: Any supplementary notes about the platform.
notes.title: Notes

packages.description: Describes published packages for the platform.
packages.title: Packaging Configuration

arches.description: Specifies the list of architectures to build packages for this platform for.
arches.title: Package Architectures

support_type.description: The support tier for this particular platform.
support_type.title: Support Tier

notes.description: Any supplementary notes about the platform.
notes.title: Notes

bundle_sentry.description: Per-architecture Sentry configuration. If a given architecture’s key evaluates to true, then Sentry will be bundled in official builds for that architecture.
bundle_sentry.title: Bundle Sentry

eol_check.description: Configures automatic generation of issues tracking platform EOL based on https://endoflife.date/. If False, EOL checking will be disabled. If True, EOL checking will be enabled and will use the value of the distro key for the lookup. If a non-empty string is specified, that will be used for EOL checking instead of the value of the distro key.
eol_check.title: End of Life Check

eol_lts.description: When True, use the LTS release instead of the regular one when checking for platform EOL.
eol_lts.title: Check LTS for EOL checks

base_image.description: Specifies a Docker image to use as a base for builds for this platform. A sane default that works for most platforms is computed from the distro and version keys.
base_image.title: Platform Base Image

anyOf.description: Specifies any additional commands that need to be run before attempting builds in the environment.
anyOf.title: Environment Preparation Command

packages.description: Controls packaging for the platform. If absent, packages will not be published.
packages.title: Packaging Configuration

test.description: Controls automated test configuration for the platform.
test.title: Test Configuration

type.description: Specifies the type of packages to use for this platform.
type.title: Package Type

repo_distro.description: Specifies the prefix within the repository path for this platform.
repo_distro.title: Repository Prefix

builder_rev.description: Specifies the package builder revision to be used for this platform.
builder_rev.title: Builder Revision

arches.description: Specifies the list of architectures to build packages for this platform for.
arches.title: Package Architectures

alt_links.description: An optional list of aliases for the repository prefix.
alt_links.title: Repository Aliases

ebpf-core.description: Whether or not to run eBPF CO-RE testing for this platform.
ebpf-core.title: eBPF CO-RE testing

skip-local-build.description: When true, skip this platform for local build checks in CI.
skip-local-build.title: Skip local build checks

anchors.description: Mapping used to hold YAML fragments that get reused throughout the file via anchors.
anchors.title: Unparsed Values for YAML Anchors

platform_map.description: Mapping of internal architecture names to Docker platform strings.
platform_map.title: Docker Platform Mapping

arch_order.description: Specifies the sort order for build architectures in CI. Must contain each supported architecture value exactly once.
arch_order.title: Architecture Build Order

arch_data.description: Specifies GitHub Actions runner configuration for each build architecture in CI. Must contain an entry for each supported architecture value exactly once.
arch_data.title: Per-Architecture Build Environment Config

static_arches.description: Specifies the architectures to create static builds for. Must be a subset of supported architectures without any duplicates.
static_arches.title: Static Build Architectures

docker_arches.description: Specifies the architectures to create Docker images for. Must be a subset of supported architectures without any duplicates.
docker_arches.title: Docker Build Architectures

include.description: Contains platform configuration for each platform we run CI jobs for.
include.title: Platforms Included in CI

legacy.description: Contains platform configurations for platforms we previously included in CI and published packages for.
legacy.title: Platforms Previously Included in CI

no_include.description: Contains platform descriptions for platforms not included in CI
no_include.title: Platforms Not Included in CI
